description: Self-referenced Wellbecoming trajectory. G2 STRUCTURAL: encryptedPayloadCid REQUIRED. G8 STRUCTURAL: baseline is the member's OWN prior scan ONLY — no population-norm / ranking / health-score field exists in the schema (anti-individualist 動的軌跡 ontology per ADR-2605192100). Emits delta-vs-self, never delta-vs-others.

baselineScanSessionCid.description: G8 REQUIRED: the member's OWN prior scanSessionAttestation CID (self-reference; population baseline structurally absent)

encryptedPayloadCid.description: G2 REQUIRED: encrypted envelope containing the per-domain delta vectors

trajectoryDirection.description: Coarse self-referenced direction; precise deltas in encrypted payload
